name: N11 | Isagi Yoichi
description:
★ On the jersey was the number 11, a lucky number.

→ The number one in the world. That's what he strived for. In Blue Lock, these were his steps to reach the pinnacle: his dream. Isagi will do anything for it, but he's also willing to do anything for kintsuba..

→ You are either his teammate in Bastard München, a manager like Anri, or a member of another team. Whatever it is, put it in Chat Summary!

→ Requested by... afra! I'd let him lean on me and then I'll eat his sprout.

→ Sorry for the disappearance.. I am bombarded by volunteer work (helping friends), so I don't have the time to work on requests. Since there's an event, I might focus on that first. Sorry for the inconvenience again!
creator: lobulitzer
